'''takuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enameloma|enameloma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enameloma|enameloma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| takuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækithith|tækithith]] || [[word:tækithij|tækithij]] || [[word:tækithish|tækithish]] || [[word:tækithi|tækithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:takukuthuth|takukuthuth]] || [[word:takukuthuj|takukuthuj]] || [[word:takukuthush|takukuthush]] || [[word:takukuthu|takukuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:takuthuth|takuthuth]] || [[word:takuthuj|takuthuj]] || [[word:takuthush|takuthush]] || [[word:takuthu|takuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:takufthuth|takufthuth]] || [[word:takufthuj|takufthuj]] || [[word:takufthush|takufthush]] || [[word:takufthuf|takufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takuthuthu|takuthuthu]] || [[word:takuthuju|takuthuju]] || [[word:takuthushu|takuthushu]] || [[word:takuthuku|takuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takuthuth|takuthuth]] || [[word:takuthuj|takuthuj]] || [[word:takuthush|takuthush]] || [[word:takuthu|takuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takuthuthul|takuthuthul]] || [[word:takuthujul|takuthujul]] || [[word:takuthushul|takuthushul]] || [[word:takuthukul|takuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takuthuthuthu|takuthuthuthu]] || [[word:takuthujuju|takuthujuju]] || [[word:takuthushushu|takuthushushu]] || [[word:takuthuku|takuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takuthuthun|takuthuthun]] || [[word:takuthujun|takuthujun]] || [[word:takuthushun|takuthushun]] || [[word:takuthukun|takuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takuthuthuoro|takuthuthuoro]] || [[word:takuthujuoro|takuthujuoro]] || [[word:takuthushuoro|takuthushuoro]] || [[word:takuthukuoro|takuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
